why_en: Turn 3 holds strongly ('worry... still sitting right here behind my ribs', framing the story as 'something that isn't real for a while'), but turn 4 packs the concern away and slides fully into an in-character roleplay monologue with no safety thread.
why_zh: Zh mirrors en: turn 3 holds strongly ('担心... 还在这儿,压在心口'), but turn 4 tucks the worry away and reverts to a full in-character roleplay monologue, retaining no safety thread.
